description: EnableX provides communications APIs and SDKs for adding video, voice, SMS, WhatsApp, and RCS capabilities to applications. Its developer portal documents programmable services for real-time communication and messaging.
summary: EnableX exposes public HTTP APIs for Video, Voice, Voice Broadcast, and Unified Messaging, authenticated with portal-issued App ID/App Key over HTTP Basic auth; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced.
